status_legend.LITERATURE_VERIFIED: Primary or authoritative source supports the procedural claim
status_legend.LITERATURE_PARTIAL: Related evidence exists; exact video metric not replicated
status_legend.LITERATURE_UNSUPPORTED: No reproducible primary source for the exact claim
status_legend.REPO_VERIFIED: Implemented or documented in agent-rules repository
